data.title: [record-test-status-guard]: blocks COMMIT-WORKFLOW Step 4.5 -> circular pre-commit test-gate failure
data.description:
## Incident Overview

Reproduction: From a non-worktree-harvest session, attempt git commit. pre-commit-test-gate emits BLOCKED: test gate — no test-status recorded. The suggested remediation (.claude/scripts/dso record-test-status.sh --source-file FILE) is itself blocked by the PreToolUse hook hook_record_test_status_guard (plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh), which rejects every invocation except --attest DIR (used only by harvest-worktree.sh).

Expected: COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 4.5 can legitimately write test-gate-status so the pre-commit test gate passes.

Actual: PreToolUse guard and pre-commit test gate form a circular dependency — gate reads status, guard blocks the only writer. Direct orchestrator commits fail 100% of the time.

Evidence captured this session: (1) commit attempt from main branch with staged files emits gate BLOCKED; (2) direct record-test-status.sh invocation emits guard BLOCKED; (3) guard source at pre-bash-functions.sh hook_record_test_status_guard allowlist is --attest only; (4) grep of pre-commit-test-gate.sh confirms read-only use of test-gate-status.
